summary: Professional Indemnity insurance covering professionals against claims for negligent acts, errors, and omissions in the provision of professional services. Broad UK market line covering solicitors, accountants, architects, consultants, and financial advisers.

schemaEntities.description: Professional firm entity. Custom: ProfessionCode, SRANumber, ICASNumber, ARBNumber, FCAPermissions, QualifyingBodyMembership, FeeIncome, ClaimsHistoryYears, RunOffRequired.
72 rules: SRA/ICAS/ARB mandatory minimum limit enforcement, FCA permissions cross-check, claims history loading triggers, run-off premium calculation, retroactive date continuity checks.

relationships.note: Limit adequacy and loading driven by profession code and fee income
Regulatory body registration numbers are mandatory validation fields

migrationIssues.detail: SRA, ICAS, ARB registration validation requires live API lookups. No GW Cloud native integration -- external regulatory register APIs required.
SRA/ICAS/RIBA mandatory minimum limit rules by profession. GW Cloud validation rules support minimum limit enforcement -- profession code table migration required.
Run-off premium calculation for cessation of practice. GW Cloud supports run-off but custom premium calculation formula requires rule migration.
Retroactive date tracking across policy renewals. GW Cloud renewal workflow supports retroactive date -- minor configuration work.

cloudMapping.action: SRA online register validation API integration required
TypeKey migration required -- profession code list extension
Run-off indicator supported -- premium calculation formula needs migration
